pageContext.name: Boba Fett (Deluxe Version)
pageContext.description: Jabba™ ruled with fear. I intend to rule with respect.   After eliminating Bib Fortuna™, Boba Fett's™ journey to becoming the new daimyo of the criminal empire on Tatooine™ proves to be challenging and he must prepare to fight for his newfound status in the dangerous underworld…  Sideshow and Hot Toys are very excited to present the incredible Boba Fett (Deluxe Version) Quarter Scale Figure!  Based on the appearance of the character from The Book of Boba Fett, the highly-accurate quarter scale Boba Fett figure stands approximately 45cm tall, featuring meticulously crafted armor and helmet, an interchangeable head sculpt with stunning likeness, specially tailored outfit, an attachable jetpack, blaster rifle, miniature holograms, and flamethrower effect.  This Deluxe Version will exclusively include a diorama base figure based inspired by Boba Fett's new palace throne room with LED light-up function!  Pay your tribute to the daimyo today in your Star Wars collection!
